---
title: "Tutorials & Design"
editor: visual
---

## What makes a good map?

Making maps in R:

[Good introduction to ggplot2 and sf](https://r-spatial.org/r/2018/10/25/ggplot2-sf.html)

## Adding basemaps using plugins

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=thTQMkRp3mI

## Visuals

### Accessibility

For choosing colours, [this website](https://htmlcolorcodes.com/) lets you copy the Hex code of a chosen colour.
